issue_title: Screen reader reading "button" twice on multiple controls
issue_body_preview:
### Description
Screen reader reading "button" twice for all controls e.g. [https://github.com/videogular/ngx-videogular/blob/master/libs/ngx-videogular/controls/src/lib/components/vg-mute/vg-mute.component.ts](url). Issue is that control has role="button" (which is correct) and aria-label "mute bu
test_description_zh: 使用屏幕阅读器（如 NVDA 或 VoiceOver）聚焦视频播放器的各个控制按钮（如静音按钮、全屏按钮等），听取屏幕阅读器的朗读内容，观察其对按钮角色的播报情况。
expected_result_zh: 屏幕阅读器对每个控制按钮只朗读一次 "button" 角色标识，不会重复朗读两次 "button"。aria-label 中不应包含 "button" 字样，按钮的角色信息仅通过 role 属性传达。
